'''鈭歱-d-f''' ('''kapadaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cadaverize|cadaverize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cadaverize|cadaverize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-d-f
|-
! Lemma
| kapadaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipadaf|thipadaf]] || [[word:jipadaf|jipadaf]] || [[word:shipadaf|shipadaf]] || [[word:kipadaf|kipadaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupadaf|thuthupadaf]] || [[word:jujupadaf|jujupadaf]] || [[word:shushupadaf|shushupadaf]] || [[word:kukupadaf|kukupadaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupadaf|thupadaf]] || [[word:jupadaf|jupadaf]] || [[word:shupadaf|shupadaf]] || [[word:kupadaf|kupadaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupadaf|thupadaf]] || [[word:jupadaf|jupadaf]] || [[word:shupadaf|shupadaf]] || [[word:kupadaf|kupadaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepadaf|thepadaf]] || [[word:jepadaf|jepadaf]] || [[word:shepadaf|shepadaf]] || [[word:kepadaf|kepadaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopadaf|thothopadaf]] || [[word:jojopadaf|jojopadaf]] || [[word:shoshopadaf|shoshopadaf]] || [[word:kokopadaf|kokopadaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopadaf|thopadaf]] || [[word:jopadaf|jopadaf]] || [[word:shopadaf|shopadaf]] || [[word:kopadaf|kopadaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopadaf|thopadaf]] || [[word:jopadaf|jopadaf]] || [[word:shopadaf|shopadaf]] || [[word:kopadaf|kopadaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙padaf|th忙padaf]] || [[word:j忙padaf|j忙padaf]] || [[word:sh忙padaf|sh忙padaf]] || [[word:k忙padaf|k忙padaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapadaf|thathapadaf]] || [[word:jajapadaf|jajapadaf]] || [[word:shashapadaf|shashapadaf]] || [[word:kakapadaf|kakapadaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapadaf|thapadaf]] || [[word:japadaf|japadaf]] || [[word:shapadaf|shapadaf]] || [[word:kapadaf|kapadaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapadaf|thapadaf]] || [[word:japadaf|japadaf]] || [[word:shapadaf|shapadaf]] || [[word:kapadaf|kapadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapadaf|shapadaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapadaf|goshapadaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapadaf|gokishapadaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapadafn眉|shapadafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapadafnkn眉|goshapadafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadafn眉|gokishapadafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapadafsh毛|shapadafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapadafnksh毛|goshapadafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapadafsh毛|gokishapadafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadafro|shapadafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadafnkro|goshapadafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadafro|gokishapadafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadafmu|shapadafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadafnkmu|goshapadafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadafmu|gokishapadafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapadafsher|shapadafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapadafnksher|goshapadafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapadafsher|gokishapadafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapadafng|shapadafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapadafnkng|goshapadafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapadafng|gokishapadafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapadafya|shapadafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapadafnkya|goshapadafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapadafya|gokishapadafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapadafyam|shapadafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapadafnkyam|goshapadafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapadafyam|gokishapadafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapadafn眉sh毛|shapadafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapadafnkn眉sh毛|goshapadafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapadafn眉sh毛|gokishapadafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadafn眉ro|shapadafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadafnkn眉ro|goshapadafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadafn眉ro|gokishapadafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadafn眉mu|shapadafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadafnkn眉mu|goshapadafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadafn眉mu|gokishapadafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapadafsh毛n眉|shapadafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapadafnksh毛n眉|goshapadafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadafsh毛n眉|gokishapadafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadafsh毛ro|shapadafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadafnksh毛ro|goshapadafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadafsh毛ro|gokishapadafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadafsh毛mu|shapadafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadafnksh毛mu|goshapadafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadafsh毛mu|gokishapadafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapadafron眉|shapadafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapadafnkron眉|goshapadafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadafron眉|gokishapadafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapadafrosh毛|shapadafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapadafnkrosh毛|goshapadafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapadafrosh毛|gokishapadafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadafromu|shapadafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadafnkromu|goshapadafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadafromu|gokishapadafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapadafmun眉|shapadafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapadafnkmun眉|goshapadafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadafmun眉|gokishapadafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapadafmush毛|shapadafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapadafnkmush毛|goshapadafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapadafmush毛|gokishapadafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadafmuro|shapadafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadafnkmuro|goshapadafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadafmuro|gokishapadafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
